parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor teacher
participant "操作界面" as UI
participant studentcourse
participant student
participant experiment
participant experimentscore
participant scoreitem

activate teacher
teacher -> UI : 1 选择学期
activate UI

UI -> studentcourse : 2 查询哪些学生选了老师的课
activate studentcourse

studentcourse -> student : 3 请求学生列表
activate student
student -> studentcourse : 4 返回数据
deactivate student
deactivate studentcourse

UI -> experiment : 5 查询这些课程的实验
activate experiment

experiment -> experimentscore : 6 查询实验得分
activate experimentscore

experimentscore -> scoreitem : 7 查询得分
activate scoreitem
scoreitem -> experimentscore : 8 返回
deactivate scoreitem

experimentscore -> experiment : 9 返回得分
deactivate experimentscore

experiment -> UI : 10 返回得分列表
deactivate experiment

UI -> teacher : 11 显示数据
deactivate UI
deactivate teacher

@enduml
```
